ascii_query::ThreadInfo(3) Library Functions Manual ascii_query::ThreadInfo(3)

NAME

ascii_query::ThreadInfo - Thread information.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/tooling/query/lldb_controller.h>

Data Fields


uint64_t id
Thread ID. uint32_t index
Index in thread list. std::string name
Thread name (may be empty). std::string stop_reason
Why thread is stopped (if stopped). std::string function
Current function name. std::string file
Current source file. uint32_t line
Current line number. bool is_selected
Is this the selected thread?

Detailed Description

Thread information.
